hero.headline: 27 Years Keeping You DOT Compliant
hero.subheadline: Running a trucking, limo, or bus company means navigating a maze of DOT and DMV regulations. Trans-Com handles it all so you can focus on running your business, not chasing paperwork.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Full-Service DOT & DMV<br class="hidden md:block"> Compliance Solutions
services.subtitle: Stop worrying about missed deadlines, expired filings, and surprise audits. Trans-Com handles every detail of your compliance so you can keep your fleet moving.

cards.title: DOT Compliance Services
cards.description: Comprehensive Department of Transportation compliance management keeping your trucking, limo, or bus company fully aligned with all federal and state regulations.

cards.title: Vehicle Compliance
cards.description: Complete vehicle registration, titling, and fleet compliance services ensuring every truck, bus, and limo in your fleet meets regulatory requirements.

cards.title: Driver Compliance
cards.description: Driver qualification file management, CDL tracking, and DOT medical and licensing verification so every driver on your roster is road-ready.

cards.title: DMV Service Bureau
cards.description: Licensed New York State DMV service bureau handling registrations, renewals, plates, and all commercial vehicle DMV transactions fast.

cards.title: Employee Training
cards.description: Specialized compliance training programs for drivers and staff, ensuring your entire team understands and follows DOT safety regulations.

cards.title: Compliance Task Management
cards.description: Ongoing monitoring of compliance deadlines, renewals, and regulatory changes so nothing falls through the cracks and you stay audit-ready.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Review
steps.description: Tell us about your fleet and operations. We will conduct a thorough compliance review and identify any gaps or upcoming deadlines, no obligation.

steps.title: We Handle the Paperwork
steps.description: Our experienced compliance specialists manage every filing, renewal, and regulatory requirement. DOT, DMV, driver qualifications, all covered and tracked.

steps.title: Stay Compliant, Stay Moving
steps.description: Your fleet stays fully compliant and road-ready. No missed deadlines, no surprise violations. If an issue arises, we resolve it before it becomes a problem.

about.label: Why Companies Trust Trans-Com
about.headline: We Are Not Just a Service Bureau — We Are Your Compliance Team
about.description: Founded by Judi Nelson in 1999, Trans-Com is a woman-owned DOT compliance and DMV service bureau that has served Long Island's transportation industry for over 27 years. We are small enough to provide personalized quality service, yet large enough to handle every compliance need your company faces. Our team treats your compliance like our own reputation depends on it, because it does.

features.title: 27+ Years of Expertise
features.description: Over two decades of hands-on experience navigating DOT and DMV regulations for trucking, limo, and bus companies across Long Island.

features.title: Personalized Service
features.description: You are never just a number. Every client gets a dedicated compliance specialist who knows your fleet and your deadlines inside and out.

features.title: Audit-Ready Guarantee
features.description: We keep your records organized and current so you can pass any DOT audit with confidence. Our clients have a 100% audit success track record.

pricing.headline: Transparent Compliance Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Flexible plans tailored to your fleet size. Scale up or down as your business grows — no long-term lock-ins.

guarantee.headline: Our "Full Compliance" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any compliance filing or renewal is missed due to our oversight, we will correct it at no additional cost and cover any associated penalties. That is how confident we are in our team's attention to detail. Your fleet's compliance is our responsibility.

faqs.question: How quickly can you get my company compliant?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are fully onboarded within one to two weeks. We conduct an immediate compliance review to identify urgent items and address those first, then set up ongoing monitoring for everything else.

faqs.question: Do you handle both DOT and DMV services?
faqs.answer: Yes. Trans-Com is a licensed New York State DMV service bureau and handles all DOT compliance needs. From vehicle registrations to driver qualification files, we cover it all under one roof.

faqs.question: What types of companies do you work with?
faqs.answer: We specialize in trucking companies, limousine services, and bus companies of all sizes. Whether you have 2 vehicles or 200, we tailor our services to fit your operation.

faqs.question: Can you help a brand-new company get set up?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We assist new transportation companies with everything from initial DOT registration and authority applications to setting up driver qualification files and compliance systems from scratch.

faqs.question: What happens if regulations change?
faqs.answer: We monitor regulatory changes continuously and proactively update your compliance program. You will always be informed of new requirements before they take effect, and we handle the adjustments for you.

testimonials.name: John V.
testimonials.text: I have owned my bus company for over 15 years and have had the pleasure of working with Carol Timmons for nearly that entire time. Their attention to detail is unmatched.

testimonials.name: Arkady A.
testimonials.text: They have been my guardian angels since 2017. I would be lost without them. The Trans-Com team is awesome and always on top of every deadline.

testimonials.name: Javaid C.
testimonials.text: We have been using Trans-Com for decades, working with the whole team especially Carol Timmons. Prompt, hands-on, and very professional every single time.
